title: Dark Opium [ Battle Axe ]
description: Adds a Post punk looking battle axe to the game!
body:
# This texturepack requires CIT Resewn

This was a paid commission by _Botzlock_, however anyone can use it.
A simple texture pack that adds a distinct looking Batte Axe, that's pretty much it.

![-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b447d1ef8f40474c0ba20c2f111b4f19a9f00d00.png)
